title: Inga Vaanthey Lyrics Muthal Idam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Haricharan, Surmukhi
Song: Inga Vaanthey
Lyrics : Arivumathi
Music Director : D Imman
Movie: Muthal Idam

Inga Vaanthey, Inga Vaanthey
Thalli poanthey, thalli poanthey
Nethaane nethane nilavin pethi thaane
Ne poga ne poga nizhalum vellai thaane
Moochil pookum thavaram, moondran paalil vervidum
Seendathey seendathey, chella chella
Seendathey seendathey, chella chella. Ohh...ohh

Inga Vaanthey, Inga Vaanthey
Thalli poanthey, thalli poanthey
Nethaane nethane nilavin pethi thaane
Ne poga ne poga nizhalum vellai thaane
Moochil pookum thavaram, moondran paalil vervidum
Seendathey seendathey, chella chella
Seendathey seendathey ...

En koondhalil en kadhalai, pinniye pinniye parpenada
En naatkalai, un moochinal vazhven naanada
Kadhal koothe, Koothe
Aadum naathe, naathe
Rettai udal, ottrai uyir, ippodhu thaan paarkiren
Otrai irul, netri mudi, thotte uyir thorkiren
Ennai ninaithaye, thummi salithaen,
Seendathey seendathey, chella chella
Seendathey seendathey, chella chella.

Kaipesiye vetkapada,
muthame sathamaai thanthaaiyada
Kannadiye kaigal thatta sernthom naamada
Kaigal koosa, koosa
Kaalgal pesa, pesa
Mittaai silai, thotten unnai,gittar isai ketkuthe
thottal mazhai, vittal veyil,sattar yena thaakuthe
Undhan udai poada, enthan idai kooda
Seendathey seendathey, chella chella
Seendathey seendathey, chella chella.

Inga Vaanthey, Inga Vaanthey
Thalli poanthey, thalli poanthey
Nethaane nethane nilavin pethi thaane
Ne poga ne poga nizhalum vellai thaane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Inga Vaanthey?

The song has a melancholic and soothing theme, reflecting on emotions and introspection.

Who are the singers of Inga Vaanthey?

The song is sung by Haricharan and Surmukhi.

Who composed the music for Muthal Idam?

The music for the movie was composed by D Imman.

What role does the song play in the movie Muthal Idam?

The song adds depth to the film's narrative, enhancing the emotional landscape of the story.

When was Inga Vaanthey released?

The song was released in 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Inga Vaanthey is a melodious duet from the movie Muthal Idam, beautifully sung by Haricharan and Surmukhi. The song, composed by D Imman with lyrics by Arivumathi, evokes a sense of melancholy and introspection. It captures the essence of longing and emotional depth, making it perfect for moments of reflection. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create a tranquil atmosphere, resonating with listeners on a personal level.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soothing melody of Inga Vaanthey from the movie Muthal Idam, where Haricharan and Surmukhi's vocals blend seamlessly with D Imman's enchanting music. This song captures a melancholic yet soothing vibe, beautifully penned by Arivumathi. Dive into a world of emotions with this captivating duet.
stanzaMeanings: Come here, come here, go away, go away. You are the daughter of the moon. When you leave, even your shadow turns white. The flower blooms with breath, and the third part grows roots. Don't touch, don't touch, dear, dear. Don't touch, don't touch, dear, dear. Ohh...ohh

Come here, come here, go away, go away. You are the daughter of the moon. When you leave, even your shadow turns white. The flower blooms with breath, and the third part grows roots. Don't touch, don't touch, dear, dear. Don't touch, don't touch...

In my hair, I see my love, twisted and twisted. In your breath, I live my days. Love dance, dance. Dancing deer, deer. Two bodies, one soul, I see now. One darkness, forehead hair, I lose life by touching. Thinking of you, I sneeze and get tired. Don't touch, don't touch, dear, dear. Don't touch, don't touch, dear, dear.
Come here, come here, go away

The phone blushes, you gave a loud kiss. In the mirror, our hands meet. Hands shy, shy. Feet talk, talk. Sweet statue, touched you, guitar music plays. Touch brings rain, leaving brings sun, it hits like a whip. Your dress fits, my waist too. Don't touch, don't touch, dear, dear. Don't touch, don't touch, dear, dear.
Come here, come here, go away, go away. You are the daughter of the moon. When you leave, even your shadow turns white.
Don't touch, don't touch, dear, dear. Ohh...ohh
